Interface IMultidimensionalRaster2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional raster.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C733AA49-C849-40FC-9054-9E6D0BB02CB0")]
public interface IMultidimensionalRaster2 : IMultidimensionalRaster

Properties

IgnoreMultidimensionalRules

Indicates whether the raster is subject to multidimensional algebra rules.

bool IgnoreMultidimensionalRules { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsMultidimensional

Indicates whether this raster is multidimensional.

bool IsMultidimensional { get; }

Property Value

bool

Layout

The multidimensional raster layout.

int Layout { get; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

MultidimensionalDefinition

IMultidimensionalDefinition

MultidimensionalInfo

The multidimensional object describing the mosaic dataset.

IMultidimensionalInfo MultidimensionalInfo { get; }

Property Value

IMultidimensionalInfo

RasterCount

The number of rasters (slices).

int RasterCount { get; }

int

All dimension rasters.

The slice at a given slice number (index).

Create a multidimensional pixel block.
